cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out between which times Richard could have gone to the bakery. The bakery is closed after 7pm, so he must have gone before that. Let me list out the events in order. First, Richard woke up at 8am. So he was at home or starting his day then. Then, Betty saw him at the library reading from 9am to 2pm. So between 9am and 2pm, he's at the library. Then David saw him at the electronics store
